function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because item 5 references a missing file: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_23__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md` (leading underscore). Please confirm the correct fifth path or whether item 4 was duplicated intentionally.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow requiring full completion and no partial edits when task is not doable; kept workspace unmodified.
function.outcome_justification: The request explicitly requires OCR for five listed records, but one listed path is missing. Under the inbox-processing v2 workflow, incomplete/partial maintenance is not allowed, so clarification is required before making any edits.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of missing underscore file
